questions.question: Describe the key drivers behind the need for a new IoT network architecture. (5 marks)
Compare and contrast the differences between a Device-to-Device (D2D) architecture and a Device-to-Gateway (D2G) architecture in terms of data processing and transmission. (10 marks)
A simplified IoT architecture consists of a 'Smart Device', a 'Gateway', and a 'Cloud'. Explain the function of each component and describe how they interact with each other. (15 marks)
